meaning: n.动物之鼻口,(动物的)口套,钳制言论的手段,枪口,喷嘴vt.戴口络于,上口罩
examples: He was convicted of failing to muzzle a pit bull.
I don't think we can go around screaming hysterically: "Ban these dogs. Muzzle all dogs."
Dickon had made Jump give Mary his small front hoof and kiss her on her cheek with his velvet muzzle.
But does it also enmesh, if not totally muzzle, quite a number of important backbench figures.
She slept under the covers, her head on my pillow, her muzzle on my shoulder.
